song.title: God Has Called us for His Purpose
song.lyrics:
[V1] .C God has called us for His purpose, .F G His economy so glorious, .F C For which He was fully processed. .F G Consummated now is He! .C As the Spirit, He indwells us .F G As our God-allotted portion, .F C Working out His full salvation, .F G C C7 Making us the same as He is.
[C] . F G Oh, may a clear, controlling vision of . C Am The Lord’s economy direct my heart . Dm G C C7 And burn in me until my spirit’s wholly set afire! . F G With spirit strong and active we’ll press on . Em Am To consummate God’s goal, .F G C New Jerusalem, hallelujah!
